title: Workflow Entity JSON (Current)
description: Expected JSON structure for Workflow entity loaded from current/ (isCurrent=true). Used by entity validation scripts.

workflowDir.description: Absolute path to the current/ directory

isCurrent.description: Must be true for current templates

isCheckpoint.description: Must be false for current templates

isRun.description: Must be false for current templates

isTemplate.description: Must be true for current templates

checkpoint.description: Must be null for current templates

run.description: Must be null for current templates

phases.description: Array of Phase entities (may be empty if not hydrated)
